root_goal: DECIDE-Bench: publication-quality G1 temporal benchmark — closed-book/open-book delta, long-context + RAG baselines, temporal decay curve, statistical significance (p<0.05)
original_goal: Design and implement a publication-quality benchmark evaluating G1 (git-memory decision recall) against long-context baselines, with time-proportional decay analysis. Target: top-tier venue (EMNLP/ACL/NeurIPS level).

reward_spec.threshold: methodology rivals ICLR/ACL 2025-2026 memory benchmarks (LongMemEval, MemoryAgentBench)

sub_goals: 1. Dataset: 30+ numeric-ground-truth commits across 4 temporal bins
2. Baselines: no_ctx, long_ctx_20/50, rag_bm25, g1_current, g1.5_hybrid
4. Statistical analysis: Wilcoxon, bootstrap CI, exponential decay
